concepts.label: Field communications
concepts.definition: Communications systems used by teams operating within a live field environment.

concepts.label: Communications networking
concepts.definition: Connected paths and endpoints that carry operational communications.

concepts.label: Primary communications path
concepts.definition: The principal route carrying operational communications or programme signal.

concepts.label: Backup communications path
concepts.definition: An alternate route retained to preserve operation when the primary path is unavailable.

concepts.label: Signal-path resilience
concepts.definition: Maintaining dependable signal delivery through planned redundancy, routing and failure tolerance.

language.scope: resilient primary and fallback signal paths

concepts.label: Signal-flow design
concepts.definition: Defining how signals travel between sources, processing stages and destinations.

concepts.label: Broadcast-audio delivery
concepts.definition: Routing and delivering live programme audio into a broadcast workflow and audience output.

language.outcome: deliver continuous programme audio into the broadcast workflow

concepts.label: Programme-audio feed
concepts.definition: The live audio feed carried from the operating environment into monitoring or transmission.

language.question: Confirm whether the feed is monitoring, programme transmission, or both.

concepts.label: Media distribution
concepts.definition: Carrying prepared media through a delivery workflow to an audience.

concepts.label: Live field operations
concepts.definition: Time-critical technical operation within a live sporting field environment.

concepts.label: Live sport
concepts.definition: A live sporting production or operational environment.

concepts.label: Live broadcast
concepts.definition: A time-critical media workflow producing a live audience output.

concepts.label: Reliability engineering
concepts.definition: Designing for continuity, fault tolerance and dependable operation.

concepts.label: Systems integration
concepts.definition: Connecting distinct components and responsibilities into one functioning system.

concepts.label: Testing and commissioning
concepts.definition: Verifying an integrated system before operational use.

concepts.label: Live operational support
concepts.definition: Operating and supporting a configured system within its live delivery environment.

concepts.label: Technical documentation and handover
concepts.definition: Capturing configuration, operating knowledge and responsibilities for dependable continuation.

concepts.label: Audio production
concepts.definition: Creating or transforming audio as media.

concepts.label: Web application
concepts.definition: Executable browser-based digital behaviour.

concepts.label: Software engineering
concepts.definition: Designing and building executable digital systems.

concepts.label: Data systems
concepts.definition: Structured models and operations for storing, interpreting and presenting information.

language.question: Is the primary data function operational records, knowledge and interpretation, analytics, or a combination?

concepts.label: Product and system definition
concepts.definition: Defining a system's purpose, boundaries, model and intended operation.

concepts.label: Cloud deployment and operations
concepts.definition: The runtime and release environment sustaining a live digital service.

concepts.label: Identity systems
concepts.definition: A coherent system by which an organisation or product is recognised.

language.question: Is this an organisational identity, product identity, visual-language system, or a connected family of these?

concepts.label: Physical audio systems
concepts.definition: Installed equipment and physical signal paths used to reproduce or control sound.

concepts.label: Electronics integration
concepts.definition: Integrating electronic hardware and embedded control into a working physical system.
